title: Senior Technical Support Engineer
description:
Role:

As a Senior Technical Support Engineer, the candidate will be responsible for providing 1st and 2nd level technical support to local customers, as well as regional and global escalation support for the company’s equipment. The candidate is expected to follow up on open issues until they are resolved and communicate solutions to regional service teams and/or customers.

Responsibilities:

  • Perform machine installation, commissioning, and production monitoring
  • Act as 2nd level regional support for internal and external customers in Rest of Asia, addressing all aspects of service activities
  • Respond to customer and regional service calls; attend to problems at customer sites when required
  • Deliver on-stie product training (hardware/software) to customers and internal teams, including Field Service Engineers, as a designated technical product champion for ASMPT
  • Lead or contribute to global training projects by formulating course content and materials; standardize training scope and deliver professionally
  • Develop and conduct refresher training for trainers and Field Service Engineers
  • Drive continuous improvement by developing new ideas and technologies for product training delivery that add value to our customers
  • Participate in other technical-related activities specific to our SMT Solutions offerings

Requirements:

  • Diploma or Degree in Electrical, Electronics, or Mechatronics Engineering
  • Basic project management knowledge is an advantage
  • Minimum 5 years of experience in SMT and Advanced Packaging Process and Applications in manufacturing and production environments is preferred
  • Familiarity with Fuji and Panasonic equipment is a plus
  • Experience in leading a team is a plus
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with a focus on results and quality
  • Ability to work independently with a high level of initiative and willingness to learn
  • Willingness to travel on short notice
  • Excellent teamwork and interpersonal skills; ability to collaborate in a multicultural environment with stakeholders at all levels globally

postedCompany.description:
ASMPT SMT is the Surface Mount Solutions (SMT) Solutions Segment of ASM Pacific Technology Limited (ASMPT), a global technology and market leader that develops and provides leading-edge solutions in surface mount technology, equipment and materials for the semiconductor assembly and packaging industries. In 2018, Thomson Reuters listed ASMPT as one of the world’s “Top 100 Global Technology Leaders” and in September 2019, Forbes Asia named ASMPT in its inaugural “Asia’s Best Over A Billion” list which spotlights 200 top-performing listed companies across Asia Pacific with revenues of US$1 billion and over.  To learn more about ASMPT, please visit its website at www.asmpacific.com.


ASMPT SMT develops and sells best-in-class DEK printers for the semiconductor markets as well as best-in-class SIPLACE placement solutions to electronics manufacturers and partners all over the world.  The mission of the SMT Solutions segment within the ASM Pacific Technology Group (ASMPT) is to implement and support the smart SMT factory at electronics manufacturers worldwide. ASMPT SMT supports the networking, automation and optimization of central workflows with hardware, software and services that enable electronics manufacturers to transition to the smart SMT factory in stages and enjoy dramatic improvements in productivity, flexibility and quality.  In 2018, ASMPT SMT won the coveted Factory of the Year Award in “Outstanding Production Network” category by Produktion magazine and A.T. Kearney consultancy. For more information about ASMPT SMT, please visit http://www.smt.asmpt.com/.


ASMPT SMT operates out of Europe, the Americas and Asia.  It is constantly looking for talented individuals like you. In its highly diverse and dynamic working environment, its employees live and abide by its POWER values. If you are Passionate in what you do and takes Ownership; are constantly striving to Win together with our valued customers; always go the extra mile to achieve Excellence and Respects others, ASMPT SMT is the place for you. Besides an open and trusting working environment where teamwork is valued, ASMPT SMT provide a competitive compensation and benefits package.
postedCompany.name: ASMPT SMT SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
